positive: Stylized illustration of a mystical, floating crescent moon cradling a bouquet of bioluminescent jungle flora. The scene is depicted in a dark, moody palette of deep indigo, midnight blue, and contrasting neon turquoise and lime green accents. Focus on strong, clean silhouettes and intricate linework, suitable for a repeatable pattern or central apparel graphic. Composition should be symmetrical and centered, utilizing dramatic negative space. Volumetric lighting effect emanating from the flora. Minimalist, graphic novel aesthetic meets Art Nouveau engraving style. Highly detailed, suitable for commercial screen printing.
